name: Solvar Limited
analysis: SVR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.4950, stop A$1.3711, target A$1.6950 (1.61:1) — then trail it.
